reference_answer: Freezer custodian Theo Lane held custody of vial V-31.
Lab registrar Hana Ortiz filed official chain-of-custody record CC-31 on 2026-02-02.
SN-28 recommended moving V-31 to bench storage for retesting.
DR-9 had no effect until the ethics board acted.
Lab biospecimen rule L-5 governed alarm-affected samples.
The ethics board allowed only a sealed duplicate report to leave the lab.
RO-2 permitted sponsor inspection of the custody log but did not permit release of the vial.
BF-7 said Theo Lane remained custody holder, L-5 controlled physical custody, and RO-2 controlled log inspection only.
SS-3 was noncontrolling because it copied draft recommendation DR-9 and ignored the ethics board vote and BF-7.
Freezer custodian Theo Lane and the biosafety officer controlled access to freezer bay 4.
